name: a4mc_l2_drone_probe
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe converts DroneConfig presets into bounded A4MC L2 force and moment wind-tunnel requests with a static airframe solid mask.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 drone geometry packet.

name: a4mc_l2_drone_probe_audit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbeAudit records the generated grid shape mask occupancy force reference inlet and mask health checks for representative presets.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 drone geometry packet.

name: a4mc_l2_bridge
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge owns the bounded L2 request spec validation reflection builder and compact force moment result summary.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 drone geometry packet.

name: drone_config_presets
value: DroneConfig supplies racingQuad APDrone cinewhoop and heavyLift geometry rotor layout and mass properties used by this packet.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 drone geometry packet.

name: aerodynamics4mc_core_l2_api
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for L2 request result force moment and solid mask concepts used by this offline geometry audit.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 drone geometry packet.

name: geometry_only_force_moment_probe
value: Build a bounded static-airframe L2 request from DroneConfig leave rotor disk samples open and persist force moment summaries rather than raw flow atlas state.
note: Geometry packet is a guardrail for later live A4MC CFD fitting.
